{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":67},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7611859832011703065","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"评分有点低 应该是7.5甚至以上耶 ⁺ʚ⦁⩊⦁ɞ⁺"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772276844,"group_id":"7531985986218118168","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1675274000536187"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531985986218118168","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"205"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7394,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7606394934524166937","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书是好看的 自我认为 以下为自我评价 不参与评分标准 也是第一次长评 且看了只有一半等 在我的世界(番茄)中算得上是中等偏上了 我看了一半以上 半本文基本讲主角和史蒂夫那些事 虽说有him等出场但是过于少 且让人抓不到讲的点在哪 在一章中75%讲主角在主世界和史蒂夫他们斗智斗勇 不被发现 25%讲下界him等(后续有一丢烦村剧情) 有些杂乱 观感中等 讲主角加入him等人后剧情偏少 半本下来45%左右 后续偏多 主要是有个雷点 在中前期 主角实力偏弱 打不过另一个副意识 错误 并且有大量描写 主角被写的有点像 废柴 him的一些出场也有些云里雾里 但是主角性格塑造很棒 日常也烘托的不错 值得去观看 如有不对请补充 因为是大半夜写的 作者写的还是很好的!!!请勿喷 个人观点
(☍﹏⁰)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771006169,"group_id":"7531985986218118168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny0JS3pjZFzdw4x88dcdFN9g42MtjmAYp1uf+wAZB4xG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0139638320d34d348484a11d37435d01~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701117&x-signature=509nW%2FAuqaKhTRQSH3P1egyiteU%3D","user_id":"1675274000536187","user_name":"/L6/"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1675274000536187","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531985986218118168","book_info":{"abstract":"在MC里当了好久的建筑党和红石党的苏误，在一次熬夜玩MC之后意外穿越到了游戏中。
他发现自己可以解锁null的形态，于是努力挣取击杀经验值。
但他发现，这个MC并不简单……
死灵骑士，303，HIM陆续出场。
但苏误并不想就这样跟着不死军团，因为他发现这个世界水深得很，各种突发情况层出不穷。

":{},"text":"文笔可以，人物塑造生动形象，角色设定及其情节历程都还挺不错的，故事剧情合理有趣，是我遇到过的mc小说里屈指可数的佳作，期待作者往后所创作的剧情发展，希望不要让读者失望，请继续保持，加油。[书架加一]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771311341,"group_id":"7531985986218118168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N23ssTMDAs+M9Su5OWRcA9rB4bk8/edMwiXoPKrh6B+w","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7348516a8f2e493d9bcad0273a62a4bf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703915&x-signature=wEVfhrEEXfcULYd56EjNDXw2clk%3D","user_id":"3716830177800573","user_name":"Reed_Viper"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3716830177800573","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531985986218118168","book_info":{"abstract":"在MC里当了好久的建筑党和红石党的苏误，在一次熬夜玩MC之后意外穿越到了游戏中。

，在这里养书，因为作者基本上是一天一更，也挺勤快的，所以我一般会过几天看一次，这样子看起来会比较爽，而且剧情也可以连贯一点，如果一天看一次的话，会导致今天看一点剧情，然后去看另外一本书，然后明天就感觉有点衔接不上来"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762083658,"group_id":"7531985986218118168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不同的时间，不同的地点却有着相同的人。

不同人眼中的世界是不同的，包括你和我。
所以说让我们用眼睛去看这个世界吧，好好看看这个世界的真相吧……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0SEpVxlHsctQgE7SRQ6/VApOie5g+cIV6aVClCyYc22","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/44bdf7eb2cab4fe18e3126dccb00f027~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702045&x-signature=Y8z8fuGmic9%2B6CF4Ogq03D0DEr8%3D","user_id":"1890809131046206","user_name":"灵感欠费"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1890809131046206","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531985986218118168","book_info":{"abstract":"在MC里当了好久的建筑党和红石党的苏误，在一次熬夜玩MC之后意外穿越到了游戏中。

到第二本符合我心意的书了，今天终于遇见了，作者写的好好！其实还有些期待想看看苏误与不死军团的日常[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759417758,"group_id":"7531985986218118168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为爱发电","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxK9kkT5gxwkzU9vBajHn7p5lcZe/PHhVQC4eIDNo+Tg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/254a31b4510449269a6077a3f24f5a6e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703601&x-signature=qyzX2f4qGpj408Ts4vaCiK%2BBeq4%3D","user_id":"2047747817479947","user_name":"坍缩梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2047747817479947","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531985986218118168","book_info":{"abstract":"在MC里当了好久的建筑党和红石党的苏误，在一次熬夜玩MC之后意外穿越到了游戏中。
他发现自己可以解锁null的形态，于是努力挣取击杀经验值。
但他发现，这个MC并不简单……
